projects.name: Football Predictor tests
projects.notes: Root automated Python test coverage for the football predictor package.

projects.name: Speech-to-Text helper tests
projects.notes: Offline unit coverage only; does not require Google credentials.

projects.name: egosphere demo build
projects.notes: Builds the minimal C demo when a GCC-compatible make toolchain is present.

projects.name: WialWohm prototype build
projects.notes: Builds the small C prototype with the local Makefile.

projects.name: User profiling genome harness
projects.notes: Compiles the documented genome test harness when GCC is available.

projects.name: OpenAI chat smoke script
projects.notes: Manual integration check. Excluded from automated root builds by design.

projects.name: OrbSeeker pygame prototype
projects.notes: Interactive runtime prototype rather than a deterministic build target.

projects.name: OrbSeeker idTech2 game module
projects.notes: Requires a configured Quake II SDK checkout and manual link settings.

projects.name: zipSongAI Win32 build
projects.notes: Run from a Visual Studio Developer PowerShell with the Windows SDK loaded.

projects.name: ORBEngine sandbox Win32 build
projects.notes: Prototype Win32 sandbox build; intentionally excluded from default automation.

projects.name: tommybeta Game Boy ROM
projects.notes: Builds through the workspace GBDK toolchain bootstrap and produces tommybeta.gb.

projects.name: tommygoomba asset pipeline and ROM
projects.notes: Builds the placeholder asset pipeline and produces tommygoomba_rom.gb through the workspace GBDK toolchain bootstrap.

projects.name: KaijuGaiden devkitPro build
projects.notes: Uses the repaired root devkitPro wrapper to build kaijugaiden.gba through the workspace toolchain setup.

projects.name: readAIpolish automated pipeline
projects.notes: Script installs system packages and elevates privileges, so it stays manual.

projects.name: Speech-to-Text CLI runtime
projects.notes: Runtime flow needs Google credentials and input media, so it is not part of the default root build.
